jobs.label: backend-api
jobs.notes: Python and Django specialist should clearly lead. Flask candidate should be medium. Salary mismatch and irrelevant skills should hurt.

job.job_description_text: Build backend matching services with Python, Django, SQL, and API platform ownership.

jobs.label: frontend-product
jobs.notes: Vue candidate is the obvious top fit. React candidate is related-but-not-identical and should still rank reasonably high.

job.job_description_text: Build product interfaces with Vue, JavaScript, design systems, and close collaboration with design.

jobs.label: ml-engineer
jobs.notes: Machine learning candidate should lead on skill depth but salary mismatch should still be visible as a penalty.
